docs.text: Rajarshi Dasgupta Department of Computational and Data Sciences (CDS) Indian Institute of Science (IISc) , Bengaluru - 560012, India. Email: rajarshi99@gmail.com Recent ¶ Background ¶
docs.title: About

docs.text: Education ¶ PhD Joined STARS lab in August 2022 under the guidance of Prof. Sashikumaar Ganesan at the CDS department, IISc BS-MS with a Physics Major at Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Mohali with a CPI of 8.9 out of 10. Class 12 Complete in Kendriya Vidyalaya, IIT Kanpur with average of 93%. Experience ¶ May 2021 - April 2022 Exploring an evolution model and examining robustness of self organised criticality in the presence of random links; analysis of an interesting emergent “activity network” that we found in the system, under the guidance of Prof. Sudeshna Sinha; published in EPJP June - July 2021 Conducted help sessions for second year undergraduate course on Electrodynamics. May-July 2018 Computational work on one dimensional maps, understanding dimensionality of fractals, learnt and implemented the ‘small-world’ network, studied spatio-temporal characteristics of coupled lattice maps, under the guidance of Prof. Sudeshna Sinha Skills ¶ Programming Languages C, C++, Python, MATLAB Software LATEX, shell scripting with basic UNIX programs including AWK scripting
